title: Claude just dropped UltraCode... Unlock SuperPowers
summary: Claude released UltraCode, a feature that enables spinning up to 10 parallel agents managed by code instead of a master LLM. The video demonstrates using UltraCode for judge panels, adversarial verification, deterministic fan-out patterns, and building an agentic operating system with dynamic model selection via OpenRouter.
writeup: The video covers Claude's UltraCode, a feature that coordinates up to 10 parallel agents through code instead of a master LLM. It details the system's support for judge panels, adversarial verification, deterministic fan-out, and model selection via OpenRouter to optimize agent performance. The shift to code-based orchestration matters because it moves agent management away from a single controlling model and toward deterministic, programmable workflows.
